events.name: Initial Derailment Incident
events.description: A train carrying industrial waste derailed near the Dutch-German border.

events.name: Contamination of River Rhine
events.description: Toxins entered River Rhine, beginning their downstream journey.

events.name: Alert in Nijmegen
events.description: Initial public health advisory regarding water contamination in Dortmund.

events.name: Toxins Reach North Sea
events.description: Contaminated waters reach the North Sea, spreading to coastal regions.

events.name: Belgian Water Restrictions
events.description: Restrictions imposed on water usage due to elevated toxin levels.

events.name: French Coastal Ecosystem Threat
events.description: Reports of damaged marine life and ecosystem impacts on the French coast.

events.name: Meeting of EU Environmental Ministers
events.description: Emergency meeting to coordinate transnational response.

events.name: Contaminants Detected in Atlantic
events.description: Elevated levels of toxins found along main ocean current.

events.name: Stornoway Marine Observation
events.description: UK authorities observe early signs of contamination near Stornoway.

events.name: Heightened Concerns in New York
events.description: Contaminants detected approaching East Coast shores.

events.name: Cross-Atlantic Diplomatic Engagement
events.description: US and EU diplomatic talks discuss joint containment strategies.

events.name: Pilot Cleanup Projects Initiated
events.description: Germany initiates pilot cleanup projects using new technology.

events.name: Massachusetts Coastal Alerts
events.description: Residents advised against recreational water activities.

events.name: Broad Policy Adjustments
events.description: EU announces adjustments in industrial waste regulations.

events.name: Toxic Traces Off Florida Coast
events.description: Low levels of contamination detected off the coast of Florida.

events.name: International Environmental Summit
events.description: Global summit tackling environmental disaster management.

events.name: Public Awareness Campaign Launch
events.description: EU launches campaign to raise awareness about contamination.

events.name: Boston Fishery Closures
events.description: Fishing operations temporarily halted due to contamination.

events.name: Irish Waters Monitoring Upgrade
events.description: Ireland enhances monitoring systems for better detection.

events.name: Implementation of New US Policies
events.description: US updates its environmental policies in response to crisis.

events.name: Restoration Project in Normandy
events.description: Major restoration project underway to revive affected ecosystems.

events.name: Coastal Monitoring in Portugal
events.description: Portugal initiated continuous coastal monitoring systems.

events.name: Canadian East Coast Vigilance
events.description: Canadian authorities on high alert for potential threat.

events.name: Netherlands: Toxin Levels Decline
events.description: Reports indicate a decline in contamination levels.

events.name: Investor Conference on Green Tech
events.description: Conference attracts interest in environmental tech investment.

events.name: New EU-Wide Safety Regulations
events.description: EU finalizes new safety norms for future prevention.

events.name: Technological Innovations Announced
events.description: Presentations on new tech solutions for environmental hazards.

events.name: Ongoing Education Initiatives
events.description: Long-term education initiatives to prevent future crises.

events.name: EU Commends Cross-Atlantic Efforts
events.description: EU commends joint efforts between Europe and the USA.

events.name: Final Report: Impact Assessment
events.description: Comprehensive report on contamination's full impact released.
